001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.control;
002
003import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.control.CgmHighLowAlertResponse;
009
010import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
011
012/**
013 * Sets a CGM high or low alert threshold.
014 *
015 * Cargo layout (7 bytes, little-endian):
016 *   [0-1] threshold         uint16  - alert threshold in mg/dL
017 *   [2-3] repeatDuration    uint16  - repeat duration in minutes
018 *   [4]   alertType         uint8   - 0=HIGH, 1=LOW
019 *   [5]   enableAlert       uint8   - 0=disabled, 1=enabled
020 *   [6]   bitmask           uint8   - change bitmask (bits: 0=enabled, 1=threshold, 2=repeatDuration)
021 */
022/**
023 * Sets a CGM high or low alert threshold.
024 *
025 * Cargo layout (7 bytes, little-endian):
026 *   [0-1] threshold         uint16  - alert threshold in mg/dL
027 *   [2-3] repeatDuration    uint16  - repeat duration in minutes
028 *   [4]   alertType         uint8   - 0=HIGH, 1=LOW
029 *   [5]   enableAlert       uint8   - 0=disabled, 1=enabled
030 *   [6]   bitmask           uint8   - change bitmask (bits: 0=enabled, 1=threshold, 2=repeatDuration)
031 *
032
033 *
034 * <br>
035 *
036 * Request message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.control.CgmHighLowAlertResponse}, opCode -62, size 7
037 *
038 * <br>
039 *
040 * 
041 * <table border='1'>
042 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
043 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-62</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
044 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>7</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
045 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#REQUEST}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
046 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CONTROL}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
047 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>response</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.control.CgmHighLowAlertResponse}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
048 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>signed</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>true</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
049 * </table>
050 */@MessageProps(
051    opCode=-62,
052    size=7,
053    type=MessageType.REQUEST,
054    characteristic=Characteristic.CONTROL,
055    response=CgmHighLowAlertResponse.class,
056    signed=true
057)
058public class CgmHighLowAlertRequest extends Message {
059    // alertType values
060    public static final int ALERT_TYPE_HIGH = 0;
061    public static final int ALERT_TYPE_LOW = 1;
062
063    private int threshold;
064    private int repeatDurationMinutes;
065    private int alertType;
066    private boolean enableAlert;
067    private int bitmask;
068
069    public CgmHighLowAlertRequest() {}
070
071    public CgmHighLowAlertRequest(int alertType, int threshold, int repeatDurationMinutes, boolean enableAlert, int bitmask) {
072        this.alertType = alertType;
073        this.threshold = threshold;
074        this.repeatDurationMinutes = repeatDurationMinutes;
075        this.enableAlert = enableAlert;
076        this.bitmask = bitmask;
077        this.cargo = buildCargo(alertType, threshold, repeatDurationMinutes, enableAlert, bitmask);
078    }
079
080    /**
081     * <table border="1">
082     * <caption>Byte layout for CgmHighLowAlertRequest.buildCargo(...):</caption>
083     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
084     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(threshold) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
085     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(threshold) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
086     * <tr><td>2</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(repeatDurationMinutes) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
087     * <tr><td>3</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(repeatDurationMinutes) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
088     * <tr><td>4</td><td><code>(byte) alertType</code></td></tr>
089     * <tr><td>5</td><td><code>(byte) (enableAlert ? 1 : 0)</code></td></tr>
090     * <tr><td>6</td><td><code>(byte) bitmask</code></td></tr>
091     * </table>
092     */
093    public static byte[] buildCargo(int alertType, int threshold, int repeatDurationMinutes, boolean enableAlert, int bitmask) {
094        return Bytes.combine(
095            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(threshold),
096            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(repeatDurationMinutes),
097            new byte[]{ (byte) alertType },
098            new byte[]{ (byte) (enableAlert ? 1 : 0) },
099            new byte[]{ (byte) bitmask }
100        );
101    }
102
103    /**
104     * <table border="1">
105     * <caption>Parsed fields for CgmHighLowAlertRequest:</caption>
106     * <tr><td><code>threshold</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 0)</code></td></tr>
107     * <tr><td><code>repeatDurationMinutes</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 2)</code></td></tr>
108     * <tr><td><code>alertType</code></td><td><code>raw[4] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
109     * <tr><td><code>enableAlert</code></td><td><code>(raw[5] &amp; 0xFF) != 0</code></td></tr>
110     * <tr><td><code>bitmask</code></td><td><code>raw[6] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
111     * </table>
112     */
113    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
114        raw = removeSignedRequestHmacBytes(raw);
115        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
116        this.cargo = raw;
117        this.threshold = Bytes.readShort(raw, 0);
118        this.repeatDurationMinutes = Bytes.readShort(raw, 2);
119        this.alertType = raw[4] & 0xFF;
120        this.enableAlert = (raw[5] & 0xFF) != 0;
121        this.bitmask = raw[6] & 0xFF;
122    }
123
124    public int getThreshold() {
125        return threshold;
126    }
127
128    public int getRepeatDurationMinutes() {
129        return repeatDurationMinutes;
130    }
131
132    public int getAlertType() {
133        return alertType;
134    }
135
136    public boolean isEnableAlert() {
137        return enableAlert;
138    }
139
140    public int getBitmask() {
141        return bitmask;
142    }
143}
